note: Incremental re-verify after the follow-up build closing D-1 (dead code) + R-1 (413 mapping tests). No behavior change; prior specialist audits remain valid.

findings.message: Criterion 10 file-contents class not sentinel-scanned e2e (VF-2).
findings.remediation: Upload a payload with a unique ASCII sentinel and assert absent from logs.

findings.message: NUL-in-filename not exercised at HTTP layer; structurally moot (VF-3).
findings.remediation: Optionally add a NUL-in-filename variant or note transport strips it.

findings.message: Head-only (8 KiB) content validation; contained by attachment+nosniff (VF-5).
findings.remediation: Accept under the serving contract, or scan the full stream if stronger guarantees needed.

findings.message: Open-ended dep floors; mitigated by committed uv.lock (VF-6).
findings.remediation: Rely on uv.lock; optionally add upper bounds and refresh on a schedule.
